# Donut

## Tags
doughnut, sprinkles, topping, fast food, junk food, snack, treat, sweet, sugar, dessert, hollow, ring

## Categories
food-beverage

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/donut)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Donut;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Donut { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
